caption: A man with long hair tied back and glasses stands in front of a horizontally slatted wall, singing into a microphone. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a black vest that features blue embroidery on the lapels and a red decorative element at the waist. He holds a light-colored guitar, though only the upper body of the instrument is visible. The heads of several audience members are seen in the foreground, their backs to the camera. On the right side of the scene, the word "ORCA" is displayed in white capital letters. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to sing, his mouth moving and his expression shifting slightly while he remains in a stationary position behind the microphone. The background, clothing, and on-screen text remain constant throughout the scene.
